parameters.content:
## Google Ads branch
Structurally wired (IF checks for google_ads_cred.access_token + customer_id), but the /accounts/connect flow only ever collects a developer_token today — no OAuth access_token/customer_id is stored anywhere yet. So this branch always takes the False path for now.

Wire the real GAQL fetch into "Google Ads Fetch" once the connect flow + token-refresh piece exists to populate those fields.

## Scope note
This mirrors meta_ads.py's direct sync: campaigns, ad-level data + creatives, account-wide breakdowns (age/device/country/region), and ad-set targeting.

Skipped: per-campaign device-split breakdown (only powers one secondary drill-down). Add a per-campaign loop over "Meta Breakdown Device" if you need it.

parameters.jsCode:
const prev = $('Fetch Creatives').item.json;
return { json: { ...prev, breakdown_age: $json.data || [] } };

const prev = $('Merge Breakdown Age').item.json;
return { json: { ...prev, breakdown_device: $json.data || [] } };

const prev = $('Merge Breakdown Device').item.json;
return { json: { ...prev, breakdown_country: $json.data || [] } };
